summary: Tested mode selector dropdown and navigation features. All 7 features working correctly: Mode selector shows Personal/Adviser/Client options, Personal Mode shows 7 nav groups, Adviser Mode shows 6 nav groups, Client View redirects to /client-portal with standalone layout, Mode Selector page shows Personal Use and Adviser Portal cards, localStorage persistence works across page reloads, Mobile navigation includes mode selector with all options.

critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx properly implements mode switching with activeNavGroups based on appMode state
Mode selector dropdown correctly placed in both desktop sidebar and mobile slide-out menu
switchMode function properly updates localStorage and navigates to appropriate routes
Personal mode shows 7 navigation groups: Overview, Planning, Property, Shares, Tax & CGT, Calculators, Data & Reports
Adviser mode shows 6 navigation groups: Adviser Hub, Client Tools, Analysis, Portfolios, Calculators, Reports
Client View correctly redirects to /client-portal with standalone layout (no Layout wrapper)
ModeSelector.jsx provides clean landing page with Personal Use and Adviser Portal cards
localStorage persistence implemented correctly with 'app_mode' key
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses mock data defined in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested mode selector and navigation features. Mode selector dropdown in sidebar shows 3 options: Personal Mode, Adviser Mode, Client View. Personal Mode shows 7 nav groups (Overview, Planning, Property, Shares, Tax & CGT, Calculators, Data & Reports). Adviser Mode shows 6 nav groups (Adviser Hub, Client Tools, Analysis, Portfolios, Calculators, Reports). Client View redirects to /client-portal with standalone layout (no sidebar). Mode Selector page at /mode-selector shows Personal Use and Adviser Portal cards. localStorage key 'app_mode' persists mode selection across page reloads. Mobile navigation includes mode selector in slide-out menu with all 3 options working correctly.

mocked_apis.All data: MOCKED - All client data in AdviserDashboard and ClientPortal is mocked within the components
mocked_apis.Navigation: No backend APIs required for navigation testing
